symptoms: GET /users?page=N returning overlapping records with page N-1
Frontend infinite scroll showing duplicate user entries
Data inconsistency reported by QA in staging canary
hypotheses_tested: ORDER BY clause missing on paginated query; cursor-based pagination requires stable sort order
confirmed_root_cause: ORDER BY clause missing on paginated query; cursor-based pagination requires stable sort order
resolution_action: Added ORDER BY created_at, id to paginated query. Deployed hotfix.
